headline: IDEXX Announces UK Availability of Cancer Dx Panel for Early Detection of Canine Lymphoma
summary: WESTBROOK, Maine, April 01, 2026--IDEXX Cancer Dx Panel with canine lymphoma detection helps clinicians investigate sooner and plan next steps with confidence.

headline: IDEXX Launches Cancer Dx Panel In UK For Early Canine Lymphoma Detection, Detecting Signals Up To Eight Months Before Clinical Signs
